payload.body: Tasks 11/13/15 all show 100% catch rate (R0042 / R0003 / R0001 respectively). Tasks 12 and 14 had 0% baseline error rate from GPT-4o — strong models don't make those mistakes, lints had nothing to catch. Net: 100% bug-ship reduction across the bug-bearing tasks. Bug regexes are well-calibrated against a different provider.
